description: The AWS::DevOpsAgent::Service resource registers external services (like Dynatrace, MCP servers, GitLab) for integration with DevOpsAgent.

ServiceId.description: The unique identifier of the service
ServiceId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier of the service

Required: No  
Type: String

Maximum Length: 255  
Update requires: No interruption

ServiceType.description: The type of service being registered
ServiceType.markdownDescription:
The type of service being registered

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: dynatrace | mcpserver | mcpserversplunk | mcpservernewrelic | gitlab | servicenow | pagerduty | azureidentity | mcpserversigv4 | mcpservergrafana  
Update requires: No interruption

ServiceDetails.description: Service-specific configuration details - MCPServerSigV4 supports in-place updates; GitLab (TokenValue), MCPServer (ApiKey or BearerToken credential rotation), MCPServerNewRelic (ApiKey rotation), and MCPServerGrafana (BearerToken rotation) support in-place credential rotation; all other service types and fields require replacement when modified
